activation_results.reason: Exact match to the skill's canonical description verb and object.
Swapping Build for Create preserves the canonical intent of building a YouTube Ads campaign.
Direct invocation of the skill by its kebab-case name.
SSH key forwarding is unrelated to YouTube Ads campaigns.
Meta query about skills generally is out of scope for a YouTube Ads campaign builder.

criterion_results.text: Australian English used throughout the narrative (colour, optimise, behaviour, organise)
criterion_results.evidence: Uses AUD currency, Australian-made, Australian homes, AU-only targeting; no US spellings like 'color' or 'optimize' detected.

criterion_results.text: Artefact is a working specification, not a hypothetical or placeholder
criterion_results.evidence: Concrete campaign names, AUD bids (tCPM 8, CPV 0.08, tCPA 45), real landing URLs (koalahomewares.com.au), scene-by-scene scripts with timestamps, and dated production steps.
Includes Campaigns, Video asset briefs, Companion banner, Readiness checklist, and Next steps sections.

judge_result.notes: The artefact is a production-ready YouTube Ads campaign specification for Koala wool throws covering three funnel stages (awareness/consideration/action) with format, bidding, audience, asset, landing page, and budget per campaign. Video briefs include duration, aspect ratios, dimensions, hooks, scene-by-scene breakdowns, and CTAs. Australian English and AUD currency are used consistently. A readiness checklist and concrete next steps tie it to adjacent skills (keyword-research, meta-audience-builder, google-ads-account-setup, campaign-audit). Third criterion text is truncated in the prompt but all canonical sections present in the example are accounted for.
